name: Brickle Bites
recipeInstructions:
Heat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Line a jelly roll pan with foil, extending over the edges. Generously grease the foil. Arrange the crackers side by side on the bottom of the foil-lined pan.
In a small saucepan, combine the butter and brown sugar. Heat over medium until boiling, about 3 minutes, stirring occasionally. Pour evenly over the crackers. Spread quickly to cover.
Bake at 350 degrees for 6 to 8 minutes or until bubbly. Allow to cool completely. In another small saucepan, melt chocolate chips and shortening over low heat, stirring constantly. Drizzle over cooled crackers. Let stand until set. Break into pieces between crackers.
